subcodes.first_line: O leaf stirred by the fragrances of God! Thou art remembered, and the hearts of the handmaidens of God in the sacred garden are filled with thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مهتزه بنفحات الله ذکرت مذکور و قلوب اماء الله در روضه مقدسه بیادت مالوف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @the concourse on high
